privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.disclaimer: In case of any discrepancy or difference, the English version will take precedence over the translation

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you about how we look after your personal data when you visit our website and tell you about your privacy rights and how the law protects you.

information_we_collect.title: Information We Collect
information_we_collect.content: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you:
information_we_collect.identity_desc: First name, last name, username or similar identifier
information_we_collect.contact_desc: Email address, telephone numbers, billing address, delivery address
information_we_collect.transaction_desc: Details about payments and products you have purchased from us
information_we_collect.technical_desc: IP address, browser type, time zone setting, operating system
information_we_collect.usage_desc: Information about how you use our website and services

how_we_use.title: How We Use Your Information
how_we_use.content: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
how_we_use.process_orders: To process and deliver your orders
how_we_use.manage_account: To manage your account and provide customer support
how_we_use.marketing: To send you marketing communications (with your consent)
how_we_use.improve_services: To improve our website and services

data_security.title: Data Security
data_security.content: We have implemented appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used, or accessed in an unauthorized way. We limit access to your personal data to those employees, agents, contractors, and other third parties who have a business need to know.

your_rights.title: Your Rights
your_rights.content: Under data protection laws, you have rights including:
your_rights.access: The right to access your personal data
your_rights.correct: The right to correct inaccurate data
your_rights.delete: The right to request deletion of your data
your_rights.object: The right to object to processing of your data

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: Our website uses cookies to distinguish you from other users. This helps us provide you with a good experience when you browse our website and allows us to improve our site. For detailed information on the cookies we use, please see our Cookie Policy.

third_party.title: Third-Party Links
third_party.content: Our website may include links to third-party websites, plug-ins, and applications. Clicking on those links may allow third parties to collect or share data about you. We do not control these third-party websites and are not responsible for their privacy statements.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at:

terms_conditions.title: Terms and Conditions
terms_conditions.disclaimer: In case of any discrepancy or difference, the English version will take precedence over the translation

agreement.title: Agreement to Terms
agreement.content: By accessing and using Tohfae, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

use_license.title: Use License
use_license.content: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on Tohfae's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
list: Use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display
Attempt to reverse engineer any software contained on Tohfae's website
Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials
Transfer the materials to another person or mirror the materials on any other server

product_info.title: Product Information
product_info.content: We strive to provide accurate product descriptions and pricing. However, we do not warrant that product descriptions, pricing, or other content is accurate, complete, reliable, current, or error-free.

pricing.title: Pricing and Payment
pricing.content: All prices are subject to change without notice. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue products without notice. Payment must be received by us before your order is processed.

shipping.title: Shipping and Delivery
shipping.content: We will make every effort to deliver products within the estimated timeframe. However, we are not responsible for delays caused by circumstances beyond our control.

returns.title: Returns and Refunds
returns.content: Our return policy allows you to return products within 30 days of receipt for a full refund, provided the items are in their original condition.

user_accounts.title: User Accounts
user_accounts.content: When you create an account with us, you must provide accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibited.content: You may not use our website:
list: In any way that violates any applicable law or regulation
To transmit any advertising or promotional material
To impersonate or attempt to impersonate the company or another user
To engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone's use of the website
To introduce viruses, trojans, or other malicious material

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: In no event shall Tohfae or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Tohfae's website.

governing_law.title: Governing Law
governing_law.content: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which Tohfae operates.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes by posting the new terms on this page.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at:

cookie_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy.disclaimer: In case of any discrepancy or difference, the English version will take precedence over the translation

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: This Cookie Policy explains how Tohfae uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website.

what_are_cookies.title: What Are Cookies
what_are_cookies.content: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used by website owners to make their websites work more efficiently.

why_we_use.title: Why We Use Cookies
why_we_use.content: We use cookies for several reasons:
list: To enable certain functions of the website
To provide analytics and track website usage
To store your preferences and settings

types_of_cookies.title: Types of Cookies We Use
types_of_cookies.content: We use the following types of cookies:
types_of_cookies.essential_desc: These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with services available through our website
types_of_cookies.performance_desc: These cookies are used to enhance the performance and functionality of our website
types_of_cookies.analytics_desc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website
types_of_cookies.advertising_desc: These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you

third_party.title: Third-Party Cookies
third_party.content: In addition to our own cookies, we may also use various third-party cookies to report usage statistics and deliver advertisements.

control_cookies.title: How to Control Cookies
control_cookies.content: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can set or amend your web browser controls to accept or refuse cookies.

updates.title: Updates to This Policy
updates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Please revisit this Cookie Policy regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:
